name: accept-concrete-warm-post
description: Diya should approve a specific, on-brand post that delivers a concrete tip with proper hedging.

input.title: Two things that helped my IELTS Writing Task 2 from 6 to 7.5
input.payload:
(1) Stop trying to write 350+ words. The rubric rewards control, not volume. I wrote ~280 carefully and my Lexical Resource score jumped from 6 to 7. (2) Plan for 8 minutes before writing. I literally wrote my four body-paragraph topic sentences on the scratch paper first. My Coherence went from 6.5 to 8 just from that.

Yaar is a free practice tool that runs a Task 2 mock; not affiliated, not legal advice, your real score depends on the real examiner.
